children.text: inspection procedures of, and work rules and worker relations involving Federal employees employed in, plants inspected under this chapter;
informal petitions or proposals for changes in inspection procedures, processes, and techniques of plants inspected under this chapter;
formal changes in poultry inspection regulations promulgated under this chapter, whether in notice, proposed, or final form; and
such other matters as may be referred to the panel by the Secretary regarding the quality or effectiveness of a safe and cost-effective poultry inspection system under this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Safe Meat and Poultry Inspection Panel shall submit to the Secretary a report on the results of each review and evaluation carried out under paragraph (1), including such recommendations as the panel considers appropriate.

children.heading: Reports on formal changes
children.label: 2 Reports on formal changes
children.text: In the case of a report concerning a formal change in poultry inspection regulations, the report shall be made within the time limits prescribed for formal comments on such changes.
